query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.openId, u.tenantId, u.role, u.isTenantAdmin, u.loginMethod, t.name as tenantName FROM users u LEFT JOIN tenants t ON u.tenantId = t.id WHERE u.email LIKE '%coreydenzel%' OR u.email LIKE '%denzel%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.openId, u.tenantId, u.role, u.isTenantAdmin, u.loginMethod, t.name as tenantName FROM users u LEFT JOIN tenants t ON u.tenantId = t.id WHERE u.email LIKE '%coreydenzel%' OR u.email LIKE '%denzel%';
